title: Smoky Roasted Croatian Papelon Salad
description: A bright, citrusy salad featuring smoky roasted bell peppers, fresh basil, and crumbly feta—kid‑friendly and keto‑friendly.
instructions: Slice the bell peppers into thin strips and place them on a baking sheet.
Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle smoked paprika, salt, and pepper over the pepper strips.
Roast in the preheated oven for 15–18 minutes, stirring once, until the peppers are tender and slightly charred.
Remove from the oven and allow the peppers to cool for a few minutes.
In a large bowl, combine the roasted pepper strips, fresh basil leaves, and crumbled feta cheese.
Drizzle with fresh lemon juice and gently toss to coat everything evenly.
Divide the salad among four plates and serve immediately, or chill in the refrigerator for up to 1 hour.
